director_signature:
Yours in education,

Shem Oyugi
Director, Shinners Precious School
vision: To be a center of excellence that produces lifelong learners and critical thinkers equipped for global success.
motto_description: Striving for excellence in everything we do..
welcome_text: Shinners Precious School is a leading CBC educational institution located in Embakasi, Nairobi. Established in 2009, we offer quality education from Playgroup to Grade 9, nurturing young minds with a strong foundation in academics, character, and faith. Our school is committed to providing affordable, holistic education that prepares learners for the future.
mission: To provide high quality education and childcare in a safe, respectful and inclusive environment that builds a foundation for lifelong learning.
why_choose: Modern CBC Curriculum - Fully trained teachers implementing Competency Based Curriculum with Digital Literacy and French.
Qualified Teachers - Experienced, passionate, and CBC-trained educators dedicated to each child's success.
Safe Transport - Reliable school transport covering major routes in Embakasi and surrounding areas.
Affordable Meals - Nutritious, balanced meals at an affordable cost (optional).
Christian Values - Strong moral and spiritual foundation integrated into daily learning.
Holistic Development - Sports, clubs, music, drama, and co-curricular activities for all-round growth.
curriculum_text: We follow the Competency Based Curriculum (CBC) which emphasizes practical learning, creativity, and critical thinking. Our learners are prepared for Junior Secondary (Grade 7-9) and beyond with a strong foundation in core subjects and essential life skills.

history.description: Shinners Precious School was established with a vision to provide quality, affordable education to the Embakasi community.
Starting with Playgroup and PP1, the school has grown to offer education up to Grade 9, now serving over 500 learners.
The school is recognized for excellence in CBC implementation and holistic learner development.

director_message:
Dear Parents, Guardians, and Learners,

It is my honor to welcome you to Shinners Precious School. We are committed to providing a nurturing environment where every child can thrive academically, socially, and spiritually.

Our dedicated team of CBC-trained teachers works tirelessly to ensure that each learner reaches their full potential. We believe in holistic education that prepares our children not just for exams, but for life.

As we continue to grow, we remain focused on our mission: to provide quality, affordable education that builds character and excellence.

Thank you for entrusting your child to us. Together, we will build a bright future.
hero_subtitle: Excellence in Education | Shaping Future Leaders
